problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration may resolve What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
